metaDescription: Build confidence, get practical help, and find the right next step into sessions, support, or community-rooted programmes in Rochdale.
routePurpose: Make the first step obvious for people seeking support, carers and referrers checking trust cues, and visitors exploring the wider organisation.

actions.summary: See current Saturday offers, timings, and what to expect before attending.
Send a short message if you need help, want to ask on someone else's behalf, or are not sure which route fits.

actions.label: See Saturday sessions
actions.summary: Browse the current Saturday sessions and practical details before deciding to come along.

actions.label: Ask before you come
actions.summary: Use the contact route if you want to check fit, timing, or support before attending.

actions.label: Ask a support question
actions.summary: Send a short message if the public answers do not cover what you need.

actions.label: Get CV help
actions.summary: Find one-to-one support for CVs, applications, and job-readiness next steps.

actions.label: See all programmes
actions.summary: Understand the wider support areas before choosing the route that fits best.

actions.label: Why EncouragingYou exists
actions.summary: See the youth-led approach and the values behind the support offer.

actions.label: See community support
actions.summary: Explore the route for wider community connection and intergenerational support.

actions.label: See events and updates
actions.summary: Check for confirmed news, dates, or public updates when they are ready to share.

actions.label: Volunteer or partner
actions.summary: Explore volunteering, referrals, and partnership pathways without a complicated start.

actions.label: See involvement routes
actions.summary: Open the hub for volunteering, partnership, and referral-friendly next steps.

actions.label: Privacy notice
actions.summary: Read how enquiry details are used before you share information.

actions.label: Safeguarding information
actions.summary: Keep the safeguarding route visible before anyone has to search for it.

actions.label: Email the team
actions.summary: Open a simple email route for questions, support, or partnership interest.

audienceJourneys.summary: Make the first session or support route easy to choose without long reading.
Keep trust, safeguarding, and a low-friction contact route visible before commitment.
Show the route into sessions or contact clearly while keeping the wider programme shape visible.
Explain that the welcome extends beyond Saturday sessions and into wider community support.
Send interested supporters to the involvement hub rather than forcing them through support-first language.
Lead with credibility, partnership routes, and the wider programme picture before any ask.

hero.headline: Build confidence, get practical help, and move forward.
hero.summary: Join a session, ask for support, or explore the wider programmes that make belonging and practical help feel easier to reach.

sections.title: What can you do here today?
sections.summary: Start with the route that fits today, whether that is a session, support, or a way to help.

sections.title: Safety, privacy, and a calm first step are visible before anyone commits.
sections.summary: The main trust questions sit close to the first actions instead of being hidden in the footer.

sections.title: Two Saturday offers, one clear starting point.
sections.summary: CV support runs first, then youth club follows straight after. You can come for one or stay for both.

emptyState.title: Saturday session dates are being confirmed.
emptyState.summary: Use the support route and the team can help you with the right next step while the public schedule is light.

pausedState.title: Session timings can change.
pausedState.summary: If the public schedule is paused or unavailable, keep the support route visible instead of guessing the next date.

sections.title: Support that goes beyond one session or one need.
sections.summary: Explore the wider support areas if you want the bigger picture before choosing a route.

sections.title: Youth-led leadership with practical care built in.
sections.summary: See the values, lived perspective, and practical approach behind the sessions and support routes.

sections.title: The welcome extends beyond one programme or one age group.
sections.summary: EncouragingYou makes room for mentoring, intergenerational connection, and practical support that helps people feel less alone.
bullets: Clear, plain-language expectations before someone attends.
Visible routes for support, privacy, and safeguarding.
No third-party feed or autoplay media on the critical path.

sections.title: Public updates can stay light without disappearing.
sections.summary: Use this area for confirmed dates, community news, or launch-safe notices when they are ready to share.

emptyState.title: No public updates are live right now.
emptyState.summary: The sessions and support routes stay current while this space waits for confirmed dates or news.

sections.title: Volunteer, partner, or refer someone who needs a starting point.
sections.summary: Clear roles, transparent next steps, and no long application barrier before someone understands the ask.

sections.title: Simple answers before anyone has to send a message.
sections.summary: Use the public answers first, then keep the support route close by for anything more specific.

sections.eyebrow: Get support or ask a question
sections.title: Send a short message and we will help you find the right next step.
sections.summary: Use this route if you need help choosing between a session, programme, referral, or community route.

staysOnHomepageNow: quick routes for support, sessions, and involvement
trust cues close to the main decisions
intentionallyExcludedFromLaunch: participant photography that has not been cleared for use
dense news feed modules with no real content behind them
